qa_pairs.question: What is the primary benefit of installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder using EasyBuild?
qa_pairs.answer: Installing FreeSurfer in a shared location, such as a `/project` directory, makes the code available for any other member of the user's group.

qa_pairs.question: When installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder using EasyBuild, what are the default installation paths for the software and its module?
qa_pairs.answer: FreeSurfer will be installed under the directory `/home/$USER/projects/def-someuser/$USER/software`, and the module will be placed under the user's directory `/home/$USER/.local/easybuild/modules/2020/Core/freesurfer`.
